title: Geometric view of OLS
text: OLS predictions satisfy $$Ŷ=X\thetâ$$ and lie in the column space of X. In fact, Ŷ is the orthogonal projection of Y onto Col(X).

title: Dimensions
text: Y and Ŷ (and residuals) are length $$n$$ vectors. θ̂ is length $$p$$ (number of features including intercept).

title: Decide this statement
text: Use the projection and dimension facts above.
